---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11 22H2]
- **GrafaMon Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **.NET Runtime:** [e.g., .NET 8.0.1]
- **Grafana Version:** [e.g., 10.2.0]

## Configuration
Please provide relevant configuration (remove sensitive data):
\\\json
{
  "PollingIntervalSeconds": 60,
  "EnableSoundNotifications": true
}
\\\

## Logs
Please attach relevant log files from \%APPDATA%\GrafaMon\logs\
(Remember to remove any sensitive information)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
